title: Missing authentication guard on user endpoint
body: The getUser endpoint is publicly accessible without any auth middleware. Add @UseGuards(AuthGuard) decorator.

title: Direct database query in controller layer
body: Database queries should go through the repository layer, not directly in the controller. This violates the separation of concerns established in the codebase.
snippet:
const user = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users')
→ const user = await userRepository.findById(id)

title: Hardcoded string in Dashboard header
body: The string "Welcome back" should use the i18n translation function t('dashboard.welcome') instead of a hardcoded English string.

title: Unused import left in file
body: The moment import is unused after the refactor to date-fns. Remove it to reduce bundle size.
